calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
Declaration in support of judgment by Plaintiff's Witness Tammy Curtis, was presented in open court.
No appearance by Defendant Sunny Yu.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages $6,061.75
Prejudgment Interest $4,143.82
Costs $264.00 for a Total of $10,469.57
Judgment was submitted and signed.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
